member.summary: Closes a quote as won or lost, Revise is not supported via this method
member.param: ID of the quote to close
List of fields that need to be updated
Status id of the quote, must be greater then 3 but not 7
Optional: if set to a valid GUID, generated by the Create Batch Request Method, will assigned the request to the batch for later execution, on fail, runs the request immediately
Connected Dataverse Service Client

Adds the bypass plugin behavior to this request. Note: this will only apply if the caller has the prvBypassPlugins permission to bypass plugins. If its attempted without the permission the request will fault.

member.summary: This will close an opportunity as either Won or lost in CRM
member.param: ID of the opportunity to close
List of fields for the Opportunity Close Entity
Status code of Opportunity, Should be either 1 or 2, defaults to 1 ( won )
Optional: if set to a valid GUID, generated by the Create Batch Request Method, will assigned the request to the batch for later execution, on fail, runs the request immediately
Connected Dataverse Service Client

Adds the bypass plugin behavior to this request. Note: this will only apply if the caller has the prvBypassPlugins permission to bypass plugins. If its attempted without the permission the request will fault.

member.summary: Closes an Incident request in CRM, this special handling is necessary to support CRM Built In Object.
member.param: ID of the CRM Incident to close
List of data items to add to the request, By default, subject is required.
Status code to close the incident with, defaults to resolved
Optional: if set to a valid GUID, generated by the Create Batch Request Method, will assigned the request to the batch for later execution, on fail, runs the request immediately
Connected Dataverse Service Client

Adds the bypass plugin behavior to this request. Note: this will only apply if the caller has the prvBypassPlugins permission to bypass plugins. If its attempted without the permission the request will fault.
Sales order id to close
List of fields to add
Status code of the order
Optional: if set to a valid GUID, generated by the Create Batch Request Method, will assigned the request to the batch for later execution, on fail, runs the request immediately
Connected Dataverse Service Client

Adds the bypass plugin behavior to this request. Note: this will only apply if the caller has the prvBypassPlugins permission to bypass plugins. If its attempted without the permission the request will fault.

member.name: M:Microsoft.PowerPlatform.Dataverse.Client.Dynamics.ServiceClientExtensions.CloseTroubleTicket(Microsoft.PowerPlatform.Dataverse.Client.ServiceClient,System.Guid,System.String,System.String,System.Guid,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Closes a Trouble ticket by ID
member.param: ID of the Ticket to close
Title of the close ticket record
Description of the closed ticket
Optional: if set to a valid GUID, generated by the Create Batch Request Method, will assigned the request to the batch for later execution, on fail, runs the request immediately
Connected Dataverse Service Client

Adds the bypass plugin behavior to this request. Note: this will only apply if the caller has the prvBypassPlugins permission to bypass plugins. If its attempted without the permission the request will fault.
member.returns: Returns the ID of the closed ticket
